ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the railway station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the station */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the station */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "halt_time" INTEGER /* Time the train halts at the station */,
  "train_status" TEXT /* Current status of the train (e.g., Departed, On Time) */,
  "day_count" INTEGER /* Day count since the start of the journey */,
  "platform_number" TEXT /* Platform number at the station */,
  "train_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current train status */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the train is delayed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the train status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the schedule */,
  "next_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next station the train is scheduled to arrive at */,
  "next_station_estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the next station */,
  "next_station_estimated_departure" TEXT /* Estimated departure time from the next station */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the train is cancelled */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the train operates on */,
  "operating_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the train operates */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of the train (e.g., Express, Local) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the train */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of passengers on the train */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "train_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the train */,
  "train_status" TEXT /* Current status of the train (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station for the route */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station for the route */,
  "total_stations" INTEGER /* Total number of stations on the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "total_distance" TEXT /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_travel_time" TEXT /* Average travel time for the route */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, twice a day) */,
  "route_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the route considering all trains */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., Express, Local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
